name: hf-dimer_binding_energy
prompt: Run the binding-energy task on the hydrogen fluoride dimer using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. The complex geometry is the positional input; pass each monomer with --monomer. Report the binding (interaction) energy in eV as the headline value (negative = bound; the task also returns kcal/mol and hartree — report eV), and state the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
